notes: Phase 4. Task 4.1 complete: Expo mobile app scaffolded with 5-tab navigation, PII guard hook, crisis detector hook, non-dismissable CrisisLineBanner, AIDisclosureBanner, PIIWarningModal, camera OS-level permission. Task 4.2 complete: Service Worker (cache-first static, network-first API), IndexedDB offline draft store (web), useOfflineStatus + useDocumentDraft hooks (web), OfflineIndicator banner (web), ServiceWorkerRegistration component wired into root layout, useNetworkStatus + useOfflineDraft + useCachedContent hooks (mobile), OfflineBanner wired above tab navigator (mobile). Task 4.3 complete: DeletionCertificate/DeletionProgress/DataDestructionResult types added to shared-types; DELETION_STARTED/DELETION_STEP_PROGRESS/DELETION_COMPLETE events added to EventPayloadMap and EVENTS; packages/reports scaffolded with CertificateGenerator (PDF-1.4, no external deps); DataDestructionService in @vetassist/ai (secure wipe via EncryptedStorage.secureWipe, PII rescan, event-driven progress); DELETE /api/documents/:id/destroy SSE route; DeleteDocumentModal web component; DeleteDocumentSheet mobile bottom-sheet. All patterns: event-driven (no polling), named constants, standard file headers. Task 4.4 complete: packages/insights scaffolded (PostHogAdapter singleton, EventSubscriber, AnalyticsService, GrantReportGenerator PDF-1.4); analytics types added to shared-types; ANALYTICS_CONFIG + ANALYTICS_EVENTS constants added to shared-config; 3 analytics events added to EventPayloadMap + EVENTS; 6 API routes (consent, events, impact, admin dashboard, admin report); PostHogProvider web client; admin analytics dashboard at /admin/analytics; public impact page at /impact (ISR 1h); useAnalytics mobile hook with consent + offline gate + PII strip; /impact added to NavSidebar.
nextStep: Phase 4: Task 4.5 — VA Update System (eCFR scraper, Federal Register monitor, relevance classifier).
